post.title: Chapter Three is Here — Here's What That Actually Means
post.body:
We're in wartime. I don't say that to be dramatic — I say it because clarity is a gift right now. Every dollar, every hire, every meeting needs to move us toward one of three lanes: Legacy MRR, Jar, or CHIPS.

This week I'm focused on closing the cost restructuring plan with Niket and getting the Chapter Three letter in front of all of you. You deserve to hear it directly from me. More coming Thursday.

week.text: Cost plan finalized with Niket — 300k/month target
AI CoS Course live — 4 enrolled, $6K revenue
Chapter Three letter sent to full team
CHIPS sprint plan confirmed with Arnoe
CEO Hub launched for Design Pickle team

month.text: AI for Operators live with paying students
Board & team letters sent and acknowledged
